Search by word

Imagine. Invent. Explore.

Great transformations arise from the capacity to envisage and co-create the future. Are you ready?

Diane Coyle, honorary doctorate

Moving forward together

At the UOC, we see learning as a lifelong journey. We're by your side to open new doors at every stage and to transform your future.

"Student-centred design is a conscious decision about how teaching should be approached"

Cristina Girona, pedagogical lead at the UOC’s eLearning Innovation Center

I want to specialize without having to give anything up

Find out about our master's degrees, specialization diplomas and expert diplomas

among Spanish universites

graduates
97,500
students
150+
countries

We are leading the future of European digital education at the forefront of OpenEU

Thanks to OpenEU, our community is growing and connecting with over 368,000 students and 24,000 academics and professionals across Europe to foster an international learning space with a transformative mission

Find out more!

Open to the future

At the UOC, we open up paths where others see limits, transforming every challenge into an opportunity for growth. We're the university that moves forward with you, wherever you are

Your future starts here

What people have said
about the UOC

"This university, which itself only 30 years or so ago was a vision, an act of imagination"

Jeanette Winterson

Writer

"The UOC is for everyone; it sees being online as not just a technological thing but also a social thing"

Mariana Mazzucato

Professor at University College London

"We need interdisciplinary skills and expertise, and those are two of the things that I see flourishing here"

Wendy Hall

Associate VP at the University of Southampton

“The UOC has found ways of harnessing the power of new technology to enhance the experience of students”

Mary Beard

Professor at the University of Cambridge

"The UOC honorary doctorate will remind me to keep working in a very interdisciplinary way"

Tim Berners-Lee

Inventor of the WWW, HTML, URL and HTTP

"The UOC represents the greatest change in the definition of a university"

Martin Carnoy

Professor at Stanford University
